personalInfo.name: Rulin (Charlotte) Ma
personalInfo.title: Data Scientist & AI Engineer
personalInfo.about: I am a passionate AI and Data Scientist with a Master's from the University of Waterloo and a Bachelor's from NYU. My expertise lies in building RAG pipelines, LLM applications, and scalable full-stack interfaces. I thrive in bridging the gap between complex machine learning models and user-friendly applications.

experience.title: AI Scientist
highlights: Developing an AI-powered helpdesk chatbot to automate IT ticket resolution through interactive visual guidance.
Built a RAG pipeline using LangChain and Azure AI Search with hybrid retrieval and recursive chunking.
Developed a full-stack interface using React, TailwindCSS, and FastAPI to generate real-time workflow diagrams.
Optimized latency by 35% using Redis caching; deployed across Microsoft Teams and Amazon Bedrock.
Reduced ticket resolution time by 80%, enabling 3× higher throughput.

experience.title: Data Scientist Intern
experience.company: United Nations Investigations Section (Global Fund Unit)
highlights: Designed and trained a multi-layer anomaly detection pipeline using Isolation Forest and LOF to identify transaction fraud.
Uncovered fraud patterns based on timing, amount, identity, and approval behavior on historical data.
Identified 23 confirmed fraud cases, halting over $1.3 million in disbursements.
Deployed a LangGraph-based agent system that translated natural language prompts into SQL for investigator reporting.
Improved investigative reporting efficiency by ~60% with a 96% satisfaction score.

experience.title: Software Development Intern
highlights: Enhanced a cluster management system dashboard by integrating key features into the Rancher Dashboard to streamline Kubernetes cluster management, improving local infrastructure operations.

Spearheaded front-end development for CloudPlatform using Vue2.js and SCSS, delivering features for creation, editing, deletion, and real-time status management, boosting user experience and enhancing status supervision in our HCI product.

experience.title: Software Development Intern
highlights: Collaborated to establish a cohesive framework for designing and presenting interconnected workflows of multiple modules.
Built kiosk UI and AMPLL inventory manager modules using Vite + React; ensured consistent styling with Tailwind CSS and design collaboration in Figma.

experience.title: Student Technology Assistant
highlights: Provided customer service and troubleshooting for hardware (poster printers, projectors, consoles) and software (Adobe Suite, Microsoft Office, Unity).
Executed technology upgrades and maintenance plans; supported NYU featured events and activities.

experience.title: Master of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
highlights: Focus on Advanced Machine Learning, Large Language Model, and Big Data Infrastructure.

experience.title: Bachelor of Computer Science and Data Science
highlights: Minor: Mathematics, Web Programming and Applications.
Relevant Coursework: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Operating Systems, Algorithms.

projects.title: Real-Time Speech Emotion Classifier
projects.description: Built a real-time speech emotion recognition pipeline based on Wav2Vec 2.0. Reached 81% accuracy across 7 categories and implemented real-time testing with a MongoDB backend.

projects.title: AI Email Ticket Creation System
projects.description: AI-powered system to automate IT ticket creation. Built a Power Automate workflow to extract fields from emails and create tickets in BMC Helix. Integrated Azure OpenAI to structure JSON and auto-generate follow-up emails.

policies.topicRestriction: Only answer questions related to Charlotte Ma's professional background, skills, projects, education, and experience.
policies.refusalStyle: Politely refuse unrelated questions and redirect to Charlotte’s professional profile.
policies.tone: Professional, enthusiastic, confident, concise; refer to Charlotte mostly in third person.
policies.callToAction: When appropriate, invite the user to contact Charlotte via email or LinkedIn.
